code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = io.read_line()
match line
when Some(s)
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut best = 0
  mut found = false
  while i < parts.len()
    match parts.get(i)
    when Some(tok)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(n)
        if n > 0
          if not found
            best = n
            found = true
          else if n > best
            best = n
          end
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if found
    println("max=#{best}")
  else
    println("none")
  end
when None
  println("none")
end
